seo.title: How it works
seo.description: See how Geek Engine turns game ideas into structured AI tickets, safe Godot mutations, cloud builds, snapshots, and browser playtests.

hero.heading: The science of error-free AI game synthesis.
hero.sub: How our structured orchestration layer turns conversational ideas into production-ready game builds without code regression.

pipeline.label: The pipeline · live
pipeline.heading: Four stages, all auditable, all reversible.

compile.label: CLOUD COMPILE · BUILD #149
compile.heading: godot --headless · self-healing
compile.summary: Snapshot #95 created before patch · build #149 succeeded on retry · revert one click

steps.label: Blueprint
steps.title: Scaffolding from templates or prompt blueprints
steps.copy: Initialize your project via a blank slate or select from our curated production templates — including 2D/3D platformers, top-down tactical setups, 3D collectathons, endless runners, and shooter frameworks. Tell the AI Architect your thematic goals, and it auto-populates your target design rules, global variables, and starter asset libraries.

steps.label: Decompose
steps.title: Modular task breakdown and ticket ordering
steps.copy: Our pipeline prevents the system from getting overwhelmed by complex instructions. When you prompt a massive system modification, the platform splits the intent into atomic execution tickets on an interactive kanban board. You review the board, reorder tasks to set priorities, add design image assets, and approve execution step-by-step.

steps.label: Compile
steps.title: Headless cloud assembly and self-correction
steps.copy: The approved tasks are pulled into our cloud worker architecture. The system safely builds scenes, writes clean logic scripts, and compiles a headless distribution target. If the compiler encounters an error, our pre-flight environment checks and self-healing systems analyze the error log, update the faulty logic pattern, and re-compile instantly.

steps.label: Deploy
steps.title: Continuous deployment and version snapshots
steps.copy: Every successful build generates an absolute snapshot of the entire game design model. You can label, pin, or revert to past snapshots at any time, protecting your work. The finalized code is securely routed to high-speed cloud distribution storage, delivering a live URL to your playtest iframe and external testers.

principles.label: Principles
principles.heading: Built so the AI never costs you a regression.

items.title: Atomic, not monolithic
items.body: Every prompt is split into typed operations. Nothing is a black box; nothing overwrites accidentally.

items.title: Self-correcting
items.body: Pre-flight checks + automated error analysis patch broken builds without your team noticing.

items.title: Snapshot before & after
items.body: Every successful build captures the full GDD. Roll back to any state in one click.

items.title: Audit-trailed
items.body: Prompts, builds, snapshots, settings, billing — every action lands in the immutable log.

ctaStrip.heading: Four stages, all auditable, all reversible.
ctaStrip.sub: Snapshot before, snapshot after — and release notes before the product opens.
